description.value:
You can dash your foe to the ground with a single blow. If the Strike you make with @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.Slam Down] hits, you can automatically get a critical success on your @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.Trip] instead of rolling a check. (Both the Strike and Trip still count toward your multiple attack penalty).

If you used a two-handed melee weapon for the Strike, you can use the weapon's damage die size instead of the regular die size for the damage from a critical Trip.
